calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, #6870.

Robert S. Bartlett, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Fire Credit Union.
Pao DeLeon, Collections Manager at San Francisco Fire Credit Union, is placed under oath and testifies.
No appearance by defendant Charles J. Lovano.
Default was entered against defendant on December 8, 2014.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 24, 2014.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Fire Credit Union, and against the Defaulted Defendant Charles J. Lovano, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $42,384.95.
Interest - $4,403.00.
Attorney Fees - $3,750.00
Costs - $750.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $51,287.95.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
